label: u01
title: U1 Happy Holiday! | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: I had a wonderful vacation in Beijing.
words.trans: 我在北京度过了一个愉快的假期。

words.ex: What are you going to do for the holiday?
I practice English every morning.
I want to improve my speaking skills.
Helping others is meaningful.
My grandparents live in the countryside.
We visited the Great Wall last week.
Do you have any plans for the weekend?
We're going to take a trip to Sanya.
Traveling gives me new experiences.
I can see improvement in my English.
I like to relax by listening to music.

label: u02
title: U2 How often do you exercise? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: How often do you exercise?
I hardly ever go to the cinema.
Hardly ever means almost never.
words.trans: Hardly ever 意为几乎从不。

words.ex: I go to the library once a week.
She reads English twice a day.
What's your favorite TV program?
words.trans: 你最喜欢的电视节目是什么？

words.ex: My weekend is full of activities.
Maybe I can join you tomorrow.
words.trans: 也许我明天可以加入你。

words.ex: You should exercise at least three times a week.
words.trans: 你应该至少每周锻炼三次。

words.ex: Here are the results of the survey.
Forty percent of students exercise every day.
Good habits help us stay healthy.
words.trans: 好习惯帮助我们保持健康。

label: u03
title: U3 I'm more outgoing than my sister. | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: She is more outgoing than her brother.
He is a serious student.
My sister is very hard-working.
Lisa is quieter than her twin sister.
words.trans: Lisa 比她的双胞胎妹妹安静。

words.ex: He tells funny stories.
Dogs are smart animals.
A kind person always helps others.
words.trans: 善良的人总是帮助别人。

words.ex: Don't be lazy. Do your homework now.
He's quiet, though he has many friends.
words.trans: 他虽然安静，但朋友很多。

words.ex: Both of my parents are teachers.
I am getting better at English.
I hope our team can win.

label: u04
title: U4 What's the best movie theater? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Which theater do you like best?
These seats are very comfortable.
The screen is the biggest in town.
The service here is the best.
This is the most popular restaurant.
The tickets are the cheapest on Monday.
It's the most expensive theater.
The park is close to my home.
The food quality is the best here.
You can choose any seat you like.
words.trans: 你可以选任何你喜欢的座位。

label: u05
title: U5 Do you want to watch a game show? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: I like watching sitcoms.
She has a talent for singing.
We plan to go hiking this weekend.
I hope to visit Beijing one day.
Documentaries are educational.
I think some ads are meaningless.
words.trans: 我觉得有些广告毫无意义。

words.ex: The movie was very enjoyable.
I expect to learn a lot from this show.
words.trans: 我期待从这个节目中学到很多。

words.ex: She wants to be a famous singer.
Many stars appear on this show.
words.trans: 很多明星在这个节目中出现。

label: u06
title: U6 I'm going to study computer science. | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: My uncle is a computer programmer.
Computer science is very useful.
She wants to study medicine in college.
Which university do you want to go to?
He's going to be an engineer.
It's my dream to be a pilot.
She is a great cook.
The violinist plays beautifully.
words.trans: 这位小提琴手演奏得很美。

words.ex: I'm going to go to college after high school.
words.trans: 高中毕业后我要上大学。

words.ex: Education is important for everyone.
words.trans: 教育对每个人都很重要。

words.ex: She wants to become an artist.
I made a New Year's resolution to study harder.
words.trans: 我下了新年决心要更努力学习。

label: u07
title: U7 Will people have robots? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Robots will help us do housework.
words.trans: 机器人会帮我们做家务。

words.ex: There will be less pollution in the future.
We should protect the environment.
Earth is our home planet.
I hope there will be world peace.
Do you have a prediction about the future?
I believe there will be great changes.
words.trans: 我相信会有巨大的变化。

words.ex: The future is in our hands.
Some animals are in danger.
Everything is possible.

label: u08
title: U8 Let's Communicate! | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: We should communicate with our parents.
Do you have any suggestions?
It's polite to say
Let's agree on a signal.
Please remind me to do my homework.
Let's organize a class meeting.
Let's discuss this problem.
We need to find a solution.
words.trans: 我们需要找到解决办法。

words.ex: We should respect each other.
Thank you for your support.

label: b2u01
title: U1 Time to Relax! | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Listening to music helps me relax.
I enjoy spending time with my family.
I hate getting up early on weekends.
Reading novels is my hobby.
Too much stress is bad for health.
Reading helps me escape from stress.
Everyone needs a hobby.
words.trans: 每个人都需要一个爱好。

words.ex: Don't be so lazy! Go out and play!
My grandpa is still very active.
I enjoy collecting stamps.

label: b2u02
title: U2 Let's clean up! | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Let's clean up the classroom.
Don't litter in public places.
words.trans: 不要在公共场所乱扔垃圾。

words.ex: We should recycle paper and plastic.
words.trans: 我们应该回收纸张和塑料。

words.ex: Plastic pollution is a big problem.
We should protect the environment.
I want to volunteer for clean-up activities.
words.trans: 我想志愿参加清洁活动。

words.ex: We gave out leaflets about recycling.
words.trans: 我们分发了关于回收的传单。

words.ex: Please put up a
words.trans: 请张贴一个"禁止乱扔垃圾"的标志。

words.ex: Factories should not pollute the river.
Don't waste water. Turn off the tap.
words.trans: 不要浪费水。关掉水龙头。

label: b2u03
title: U3 Could you please clean your room? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Your room is a mess!
Please take out the trash.
Could you fold the clothes?
I swept the floor this morning.
I hate doing chores.
Can I invite my friend over?
Neither of us likes washing dishes.
I hate doing the laundry.
It's not fair! I did all the work.
That depends on how busy I am.

label: b2u04
title: U4 Why don't you talk to your parents? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: We need to communicate with each other.
Talk to him directly.
Although it's hard, you should try.
I will wait until you come back.
Can you give me some advice?
Don't argue with your parents.
We should find a proper time to talk.
words.trans: 我们应该找个合适的时间谈谈。

words.ex: Let me explain how I feel.
Good relations need good communication.
words.trans: 好的关系需要好的沟通。

words.ex: He offered to help me.

label: b2u05
title: U5 What were you doing when the rainstorm came? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: The rainstorm lasted for two hours.
I didn't hear the alarm this morning.
The storm began at 4 p.m.
words.trans: 暴风雨下午 4 点开始。

words.ex: It was raining heavily outside.
Suddenly, the lights went out.
I heard a strange noise.
words.trans: 我听到一个奇怪的声音。

words.ex: The weather report said there would be a storm.
Many areas were flooded.
The wind was blowing strongly.
There were fallen trees on the road.

label: b2u06
title: U6 An old man tried to move the mountains. | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: The old man tried to move the mountains.
There were big stones on the road.
He was too weak to carry the box.
Once upon a time, there was an old man.
Keep trying until you find a way that fits.
words.trans: 不断尝试直到找到合适的方法。

words.ex: The story shows the spirit of never giving up.
words.trans: 这个故事展现了永不放弃的精神。

words.ex: Nobody objected to his plan.
The monkey is very clever.
Some people thought he was stupid.
The magic stick could change size.

label: b2u07
title: U7 What's the highest mountain in the world? | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: Mount Qomolangma is the highest mountain.
The Pacific Ocean is very deep.
The Sahara is the hottest desert.
China has the largest population.
Wild animals include tigers and pandas.
words.trans: 野生动物包括老虎和熊猫。

words.ex: We need to take action for the protection of animals.
words.trans: 我们需要采取行动保护动物。

words.ex: The baby panda weighs about 0.1 kilos at birth.
words.trans: 熊猫宝宝出生时约 0.1 公斤。

words.ex: An adult panda weighs about 100 kilos.
words.trans: 成年熊猫约重 100 公斤。

words.ex: At birth, a baby panda is very small.
words.trans: 出生时熊猫宝宝非常小。

words.ex: The Pacific is the largest ocean.

label: b2u08
title: U8 Making a Difference | 初中英语八年级

words.ex: I want to volunteer at the hospital.
We donate food to the animal shelter.
words.trans: 我们向动物收容所捐食物。

words.ex: There are many stray cats in the city.
Small actions can make a big difference.
A good teacher should be patient.
Take action now! Don't wait.
Everyone should contribute to society.
words.trans: 每个人都应为社会做贡献。

words.ex: We should help people in our community.
words.trans: 我们应该帮助社区里的人。

words.ex: We raised money for homeless people.
words.trans: 我们为无家可归的人筹款。

words.ex: Let's raise money for the poor children.
words.trans: 让我们为贫困儿童筹款。
